_comment: Shared build configuration for all build scripts. Edit this file to add/remove content directories.

contentDirectories._comment: Directories that contain translatable content (markdown files)

sharedDirectories._comment: Directories that are shared across languages (assets, API docs). Not translated.

rootFiles._comment: Root-level files that should be copied/localized

redirectDirectories._comment: Directories that need wildcard redirects from old URLs (e.g., /features/* â†’ /en/features/*)
